case_title: BROADWAY GOUGH ASSOCIATES, LLC. VS. MATTHEW JOEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAVID P WASSERMAN, ESQ. RE: COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADWAY GOUGH ASSOCIATES, LLC.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADWAY GOUGH ASSOCIATES, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT JOEN, MATTHEW DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROADWAY GOUGH ASSOCIATES, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOEN, MATTHEW THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1790 BROADWAY, UNIT NUMBER 410 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS .SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN, ESQ. IN SUPPORT OF WRIT OF POSSESSION(DAILY RENTAL VALUE $111.02) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADWAY GOUGH ASSOCIATES, LLC.
